name: the scaffolded config is default-preserving: it extends standard and leaves every rule override commented, so enforcement still blocks a violation
command:
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/config.sh" init >/dev/null 2>&1 && printf 'apiVersion: v1
kind: Pod
spec:
  containers:
  - securityContext:
      privileged: true
' > pod.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce-file.sh" --file pod.yaml --profile ctp.config.yaml 2>e.txt; ec=$?; [ "$ec" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'status=red' e.txt && grep -q 'disabled=0' e.txt && echo scaffold-default-preserving 1>&2
